  2. Chloe’s Feet Humiliation

    by silvi_9797

    Chloe Nelson is a beautiful 20-year-old college student who ends up going through one of, if not, her most embarrassing life experience in her young life so far. Her whole ordeal revolves around her cute, small, and delicious creamy feet, which for some reason has so many guys in town going crazy over them. So crazy that they will do whatever they can to have them and do as they please, whether Chloe likes it or not. Can Chloe survive this predicament and overcome her shyness over her feet?   6. A new power

    by A0211

    Noah Campbell is a young 19 years old boy. He has always had a foot issue problem. Since he was a child, his feet have always reeked and people always taunted and mocked him for that. Even girls could not bare his proximity and every girlfriend he had, dumped him because of his problem. One day however after coming back from therapy, he is welcomed home by his cousin Chloe and something really strange happened. He puts off his stinky shoes and apologizes to his cousin about the smell, however even if initially she is disgusted and taunts him as always, later on she becomes strangely addicted and enticed by the smell. She bow down to his feet and start sniffing his socked cheesy feet. Noah is speechless and cannot believe what is happening; also Chloe cannot believe it and tries to resist her urge. However in the end she removes his socks, start sniffing his sweaty feet very hard and laughing and smirking she calls him master Noah saying how she'll be always his foot from now on. So Noah realizes his foot stink has brainwashing powers and with his new he will make everyone and overall every girl he wants a to his feet. Some of the characters: Noah Campbell: 19 years old protagonist. He has a foot issue making his feet always sweaty and cheesy. After discovering his powers he will use them to become a god and enslave everyone he wants. Chloe Campbell: Noah 18 years old cousin. She loves teasing Noah, but after becoming his she will always obey his every order. She'll be always a to his stinky feet and help him in his plans. Charlotte Spencer: Noah college friend. She is part of the cheerleader group and Noah has always had a crush on her. She has always rejected him, however things are about to change. Ella Spencer: Charlotte 18 years old sister. After enslaving Charlotte, she will be the next addition to Noah foot harem. Zoey Mills: Another member of the school cheerleading club. She is Charlotte best friend. Lucas Spencer: 18 years old brother of Charlotte. He is very caring of her sister Mia Payne: Lucas Spencer girlfriend. She is 18 years old and loyal to Lucas. After being brainwashed by Noah's foot smell, she becomes only loyal to his feet.
